star_1.text: This game is so bad, do NOT download, there's ads after every level, which I actually don't mind unlike most people, usually I'm happy to sit through ads, becuz it helps support the developers, so they can make more great games, but this game sucks, there isn't even really any challenge/danger to it, if you don't try to dodge the lasers and just let it play, you can't die, the lasers just move forward with you for all of eternity, but never hit you, just keep going with you until you make a move

I played this game, and it is not bad. But, why does a simple game like this need online services?! It doesn't have mind blowing graphics and sophisticated moves like Street fighter 1-5. I don't get it 🤷‍♂️! Pac-Man is challenging, but it doesn't need online services or data to play the game! And the ads are ridiculous! I will give it 5 stars if the developer gives Dodge Agent an offline mode. It needs an offline so that I can invest in the game and avoid the ads!

At least the creator, of this app, is honest, game has ads and a lot of them...lol! After three moves, boom, an ad is played that is so long. By the time the ad ends, I could have ran all my errands for the day, go to the gym, write a novel and the ad still would not have completed for me to advance. 🤣🤣🤣 Not worth the download.

Absolutely Dreadful. A level lasts for about 15 seconds and then there's an ad after each one, and the option of an additional ad of you want to get bonus points. Trash tier, worst I've ever encountered. The animations themselves were promising, I'd probably spend a dollar or two on a proper game like this without ads.

Very bad game experience. The game has potential to be interesting but after every 10 seconds of game, I have to watch an advertisement that is 5-10seconds. You need to work on your marketing. Why you don't limit advertising and focus on game experience? 🤔

Pointless game, it tells you what to do and pauses until you do it. Also, there is no way to turn off the vibration. I have a sensory issue and my phone vibrating in my hand is extremely unpleasant for me. This game does it every time you swipe. And it can't be turned off. Also, as others have said, ads every 10 to 15 seconds because the levels are so short.

Bad graphics in the ad the models looks good but in the real game its basically stick figures and also in the ad it showed that if you touch the laser you will loose a limb but all the lasers do is make the alarm sound go off
To many ads literally just downloaded the game and I kid you not 2 mins in and I have hade 5 diffrent ads I haven't even gotten to play with the computers help. Not a good way to start off a game.
To many ads. After every level ad pop's up. If you're going to make a game at least chill with the ads. Or make it where you can play with airplane mode on.
It's a good idea, too bad it's executed horribly. Also, once again, like many other low quality mobile games, there's no sound (Also, I recommend playing this game without WiFi, thank me later)
